SELECT SELECT pg_catalog.pg_type.typname 
FROM pg_catalog.pg_type J

tags.value:
SELECT pg_catalog.pg_type.typname 
FROM pg_catalog.pg_type JOIN pg_catalog.pg_namespace ON pg_catalog.pg_namespace.oid = pg_catalog.pg_type.typnamespace 
WHERE pg_catalog.pg_type.typname = $1::VARCHAR AND pg_catalog.pg_type_is_visible(pg_catalog.pg_type.oid) AND pg_catalog.pg_namespace.nspname != $2::VARCHAR

SELECT SELECT count(*) AS count_1 
FROM (SELECT students.id AS id,

tags.value:
SELECT count(*) AS count_1 
FROM (SELECT students.id AS id, students.student_number AS student_number, students.first_name AS first_name, students.last_name AS last_name, students.email AS email, students.phone AS phone, students.date_of_birth AS date_of_birth, students.gender AS gender, students.address AS address, students.city AS city, students.country AS country, students.postal_code AS postal_code, students.status AS status, students.gpa AS gpa, students.credits_earned AS credits_earned, students.year_of_study AS year_of_study, students.major AS major, students.bio AS bio, students.profile_picture_url AS profile_picture_url, students.user_id AS user_id, students.enrollment_date AS enrollment_date, students.graduation_date AS graduation_date, students.is_deleted AS is_deleted, students.created_at AS created_at, students.updated_at AS updated_at, students.created_by AS created_by 
FROM students 
WHERE students.is_deleted = false) AS anon_1

SELECT students.id, students.student_number, students.first_name, students.last_name, students.email, students.phone, students.date_of_birth, students.gender, students.address, students.city, students.country, students.postal_code, students.status, students.gpa, students.credits_earned, students.year_of_study, students.major, students.bio, students.profile_picture_url, students.user_id, students.enrollment_date, students.graduation_date, students.is_deleted, students.created_at, students.updated_at, students.created_by 
FROM students 
WHERE students.is_deleted = false ORDER BY students.created_at DESC 
 LIMIT $1::INTEGER OFFSET $2::INTEGER

SELECT pg_catalog.pg_class.relname 
FROM pg_catalog.pg_class JOIN pg_catalog.pg_namespace ON pg_catalog.pg_namespace.oid = pg_catalog.pg_class.relnamespace 
WHERE pg_catalog.pg_class.relname = $1::VARCHAR AND pg_catalog.pg_class.relkind = ANY (ARRAY[$2::VARCHAR, $3::VARCHAR, $4::VARCHAR, $5::VARCHAR, $6::VARCHAR]) AND pg_catalog.pg_table_is_visible(pg_catalog.pg_class.oid) AND pg_catalog.pg_namespace.nspname != $7::VARCHAR

spans.operationName:
CREATE CREATE TABLE students (
	id UUID NOT NULL, 
	student_number

tags.value:
CREATE TABLE students (
	id UUID NOT NULL, 
	student_number VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, 
	first_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, 
	last_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, 
	email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, 
	phone VARCHAR(20), 
	date_of_birth DATE, 
	gender gender, 
	address TEXT, 
	city VARCHAR(100), 
	country VARCHAR(100), 
	postal_code VARCHAR(20), 
	status studentstatus, 
	gpa FLOAT, 
	credits_earned INTEGER, 
	year_of_study INTEGER, 
	major VARCHAR(200), 
	bio TEXT, 
	profile_picture_url VARCHAR(500), 
	user_id UUID, 
	enrollment_date DATE, 
	graduation_date DATE, 
	is_deleted BOOLEAN, 
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITHOUT TIME ZONE, 
	updated_at TIMESTAMP WITHOUT TIME ZONE, 
	created_by UUID, 
	PRIMARY KEY (id)
)
